## Goal

What is the intended outcome?

## Changes

What changed (high level)?

## Design Notes

If relevant, summarize the design and link ADRs:
- ADRs: `docs/adr/NNNN-...`

## How To Test

- [ ] `scripts\verify.cmd` (recommended)
- [ ] Unity opens project `Duty Calls/` with no Console errors
- [ ] EditMode tests (if applicable)
- [ ] PlayMode tests (if applicable)

## Docs / Decisions

- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/workflow changed)
- [ ] ADR added/updated (if a non-trivial decision was made)

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No generated Unity folders committed (`Library/`, `Temp/`, `Logs/`, `UserSettings/`)
- [ ] `.meta` files included for any added/moved/renamed assets
- [ ] No LINQ and no `var`
